title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 267.703 - Infected or exposed animals not to be moved
text:
267.703.  Infected or exposed animals not to be moved. — No sheep or goats which, just prior to movement, were infected with or exposed to scabies shall be moved into or within the state of Missouri for any purposes except as provided in sections 267.670 to 267.730 and the regulations of the department and the regulations of the United States Department of Agriculture.
(L. 1961 p. 26 § 11)
